CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_date Date) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-01')), (2, toDate('2024-06-01')), (3, toDate('2023-12-31'));
SELECT addMonths(event_date, 6) AS modified_date FROM test_dates;
WITH (SELECT MAX(event_date) FROM test_dates) AS max_date SELECT addMonths(max_date, 12) AS twelve_months_later;
WITH toDate('2024-01-01') AS start_date SELECT addMonths(start_date, -1) AS one_month_before, addMonths(start_date, 0) AS same_date, addMonths(start_date, 12) AS one_year_later;
SELECT event_date, addMonths(event_date, 2) AS two_months_later FROM test_dates WHERE event_date <= toDate('2024-05-31');
WITH (SELECT toDate('2024-01-01')) AS base_date SELECT addMonths(base_date, 3) AS three_months_later, addMonths(base_date, 6) AS six_months_later;
SELECT a.id, addMonths(a.event_date, b.num_months) AS adjusted_date FROM test_dates AS a JOIN (SELECT 2 AS num_months) AS b ON a.id = 1;
CREATE TABLE date_strings (id UInt32, event_datetime String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT addMonths(toDateTime(event_datetime), 1) AS modified_datetime FROM date_strings;
WITH '2024-01-31 23:59:59' AS string_date SELECT addMonths(string_date, 2) AS date_plus_two_months;
WITH (SELECT toDate('2024-02-29')) AS leap_date SELECT addMonths(leap_date, 12) AS leap_year_plus_one_year;
CREATE TABLE multi_date_test (id UInt32, start_date Date, months_to_add Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO multi_date_test VALUES (1, toDate('2024-01-31'), 1), (2, toDate('2024-02-28'), 2), (3, toDate('2023-01-01'), 12);
SELECT id, addMonths(start_date, months_to_add) AS adjusted_date FROM multi_date_test;
WITH (SELECT MIN(start_date) FROM multi_date_test) AS min_date SELECT addMonths(min_date, 24) AS date_two_years_later;
